title: GravityCenter Property
description: Sets or returns the value of the center of gravity for the overall robot hand and workpiece/payload at the leading end side from the force sensor.
notes:
Sets or returns the value of the center of gravity for the overall robot hand and workpiece/payload at the leading end side from the the force sensor (not including the force sensor).

Set the position of the center of gravity for the Tool 0 coordinate system (robot hand center datum).

Mass Property Object is used to compensate for the effects of gravity on the force control function.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
examples:
> MPSet MP1.GravityCenter, 10, 10, 100
> MPSet MP1.Mass, 2
> MP 1
> Move CurPos +TLW(10) FC1 ROT
